# Daily Report ‚Äî 2026-07-07

## Task Completed
Added `get_change_schedule_span` tool (GET cmn_schedule_span/{sys_id} with 404 guard).

The tool retrieves a single `cmn_schedule_span` record by its sys_id and returns fully
normalised span data including `schedule`, `type`, `repeat_type`, `day_of_week`,
`day_of_week_label`, `start_date_time`, `end_date_time`, `all_day`, and `repeat_until`.
A 404 guard returns a clean failure message when the sys_id does not exist.
Registered in `change_coordinator` and `full` tool packages.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 2084
- Coverage: 93%
- All passing: yes

## Security
Pre-existing environment-level advisories for setuptools, urllib3, wheel ‚Äî no changes
introduced by this work.

- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` ‚Äî added import and tool registry entry
